AddString: 40001,do_CheckAlignerMaterial(): the material is absent or unknown!
41002,No such station for size and capacity,their values are
42101,step num or cyclenum extend valid range
42400,Connected Vbe Port Name is null - can't get system operating mode
42401,Cannot provide m_station id info to the mapper
42422, : Error Code is not exist in error map!
42500, Index bad for adding new named index to list
42600, Error. attempting to change handoff request (load and unload) during active handoff
42601, Error. Slot parameter value out of range
42800, The currentStatus isn't allowed to selectPP and start!
42900, Failed to Turn Pump On for Time Out.
42902, Temp max in setup is invalid.
42911, Recipe parameter Pressure(mT) is bigger than allowed max value in step
42913,Recipe param config is wrong. Please check
42925, invalid index for getOpenValveId in ProcessGasRecipe
42926, invalid index for getCloseValveId in ProcessGasRecipe
42931, epd time is small than MinEPDTime
42933, wait for end top temp stable timeout
42934, recipe step interrupted for has fatal alarm
42935, MinEPDTime is bigger than MaxEPDTime in step
42938, ESC Voltage max in setup is invalid
42940, Pressure is not stable during process
42941, RF is not stable during process
42942, Initialize failed for status is abnormal.Please check status of
42943, The RF LinerAdjust is not allowed to over RF power max .
42944, Recipe param config is wrong. Please check.
42945, the specified power value overstep max value
42950, Device's wafer status is unknown please check wafer status.
42951, Device's wafer status is not identical with the recipe type
42952, Device's wafer status is absent but recipe has dechuck step.
42953, Device's wafer status is present but recipe has not dechuck step.
42954, Recipe wafer type is unknown please check recipe.
42956, Wafer thickness is invalid. Check if the waferthickness between Recipe WaferThicknessMin and WaferThicknessMax.
42957, Etch time is invalid.Not usetime.please Check if (waferthickness-WaferThicknessObject)/EtchRate between Recipe EtchTimeMin and EtchTimeMax
42958, Etch time is invalid. Usetime please check if waferthickness between EtchTimeMin*60 and EtchTimeMax*60
42959, Process Module has Error And Fatal Alarm.
42971, bosh process step interrupted for has fatal alarm
43020, Unable to locate Gas valve for Gas
43080, can not set MFC until MFC_calibration is done
43081, the specified controlled pressure is bigger than the allowed max pressure
43082, the specified controlled pressure is out of range: too small
43123,Precondition: RequestToExtend is Active is not true
43200,:brooks station translator(): unable to translate to physical robot station
43211, is an I/O dataItem; cannot set value
43220, Cannot create material. Location does not exist.
